title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIIT Hyderabad

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIIT Hyderabad
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIIT Hyderabad. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About IIIT Hyderabad:
IIIT Hyderabad is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIIT Hyderabad!
